title: aster angulatus
intro: Aster angulatus, also known as White Tansy or Alpine Aster, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aster angulatus often involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although its effectiveness and safety as a treatment have not been extensively scientifically studied.
